creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to matthias+freebsd+bugzilla from comment #12)
Test on 13.1-RC2, or stable/13 post f6138d93b5115ff560b24200d1ea002cdc46bb64 or main post 0bf7acd6b7047537a38e2de391a461e4e8956630. It'll be fixed there.

The fix will not land in 12, for boring reasons (see https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/sys/net/if_epair.c?h=stable/12&id=56dc95b249dceb30367a77dccd0231cbb08dc1f7).

I do not intend to work on this for stable/12. Upgrade to 13.
